stemHtml:
From this WSSS ATIS F, what is correct?

WSSS ATIS F, 0230 METAR, Exp ILS Apch, segregated PARL Ops, ARR 02L DEP 02C, TWY EP/A3 and E3 southbound closed...

options.a: ATIS based on 0230Z METAR; some taxiways closed due to work in progress.
options.b: RWY 02C for departures; info F available on 121.65.
options.c: Wind shear warning is in force; wind 010° variable.
